case_title: ALEXANDER, BRYAN VS GUZMAN, ALBERTO SR. DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, ALBERTO SR. DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE GUZMAN, ANA V.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,277.63 FILED BY ALEXANDER, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, ALBERTO SR. DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE GUZMAN, ANA V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
GUZMAN IS DISM WITH PREJUDICE. POS WAIVED.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DEBBIE A. WARREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, BRYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN, ALBERTO SR. DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE GUZMAN, ANA V. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CHANGE DEFENDANT'S NAME TO ALBERTO GUZMAN SR DBA FLEMING AUTO SERVICE. ANA V. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, ALBERTO SR. DBA FLEMING'S AUTO SERVICE GUZMAN, ANA V.
